description: Log in to Socioboard (http://localhost) using admin@socioboard.local and password Admin2024!. Create a draft post with the text 'We are thrilled to announce our new Q3 sustainability initiative! Read the full press release below. #EcoFriendly #GreenTech' and attach the image from /home/ga/Documents/Q3_Sustainability_Campaign.jpg. The post must be saved as a draft and not published.

metadata.expected_text: We are thrilled to announce our new Q3 sustainability initiative! Read the full press release below. #EcoFriendly #GreenTech
